rule_metadata.name: ft_tar
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Signature to detect on TAR archive files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_tar
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20151116"
		desc = "Signature to detect on TAR archive files"

	strings:
		$magic = { 75 73 74 61 72 }

	condition:
		$magic at 257
}
